---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature for quarry
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

Example scenarios:
- "As a user, I want to [...] so that [...]"
- "Currently, I have to [...] which is cumbersome because [...]"

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution. Include:

- How the feature would work from a user perspective
- Any new CLI flags, config options, or API endpoints
- How it integrates with existing functionality

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternative solutions you've considered:

1. Alternative A: [description and why you rejected it]
2. Alternative B: [description and why you rejected it]

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request:

- Similar features in other tools?
- Links to relevant documentation or papers?
- Mock-ups or diagrams?

## Would You Be Willing to Implement This?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting

## Priority (Optional)

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - blocking my use case
- [ ] Important - significantly improves my workflow
- [ ] Nice to have - would be convenient
